name: Garlic Pasta (Jnwg16a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1 tablespoon of butter in a small skillet.
2. Add the slivered almonds and toast them until lightly golden.
3. Add minced garlic and sauté together for about 30 seconds.
4. Cook pasta according to package directions.
5. Drain the pasta, then pour it over the melted butter in the skillet.
6. Stir until the butter is melted and evenly coated with the pasta.
7. Add slivered almonds and grated Parmesan cheese.
8. Toss everything together and serve with salad.
